summary: The 27/Mar/2026 00:00:43-00:00:51 AFF bootstrap window is entirely localhost-driven. Apache and FireFlow logs show only 127.0.0.1 requests in the target slice, with no immediately preceding non-localhost or browser-visible request in that window. Supporting PHP sources show the browser-facing suite entry is /algosec-ui/login and /afa/php/SuiteLoginSessionValidation.php, while BusinessFlow login is issued server-side through BusinessFlowAPI::login to /BusinessFlow/rest/v1/login.
follow_up_recommendations: Trace the local originator of the 127.0.0.1 requests at 00:00:43 if the operator needs the process or scheduler that starts the midnight bootstrap loop.

If a true browser-originated precursor is required for March 27 specifically, extend the investigation to earlier or adjacent access logs outside the midnight slice and correlate by cookie or user agent.
